column_descriptions.Operation Mode: ASLF: Asynchronous with Laser Fire, SLF: Synchronous with Laser Fire
column_descriptions.Measurement type: EP: Each Pulse, LP: Last Pulse
column_descriptions.Force Reset status: 1: Background scene spectral data, 0: Check for laser fire status
column_descriptions.Laser Fire Status: 1: Plasma emission spectral data, 0: Check for force reset status
column_descriptions.Response_Count: Count for each pixel where pixel number ranges from 1 to 2094
column_descriptions.X Factor: X (Multiplication)Factor: 1X or 5X with respect to defined number of pulses
